title: RSNA Pneumonia Detection
methodology: Object detection on chest X-rays (DICOM); RetinaNet baseline + YOLOv8 advanced; medical imaging twin of project 10 Severstal industrial defect detection
needs_main_session_execution: data download (kaggle competitions download -c rsna-pneumonia-detection-challenge, requires rules acceptance and is ~3.7 GB)
blockers: Dataset behind Kaggle competition acceptance and >2 GB; documented only per Phase 1 rules
